summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WM Finance MVP. Backend APIs 95.8% successful, Frontend has critical JavaScript errors preventing full navigation testing.

minor_issues.impact: Cannot use provided test credentials, but new user registration works

ui_bugs.issue: JavaScript runtime errors: 'Select.Item must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents navigation to transactions, contractors, projects pages - application crashes

integration_issues.issue: Cannot navigate between pages after initial dashboard load due to JS errors

passed_tests: Dashboard Load with Metrics and Charts
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Select component JavaScript errors in frontend. Multiple Select components have empty string values causing runtime crashes. This prevents users from navigating beyond the dashboard. Error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string.' Affects transactions, contractors, projects, and settings pages.
